Of course, I'd be glad to. What's the project, and what are you stuck on?

That's a common spot to get stuck. Walk me through what you've tried — what hosting are you using, and what error do you see?

No worries at all. Missing-dep errors usually come from a package not in your package.json or an environment mismatch. Can you paste the exact error?
